name: order-summary
title: Order summary
description: A checkout order summary card with line items, a promo code input, a total, and a pay-now button.

files.content:
import { Card, CardHeader, CardTitle, CardContent, CardFooter, } from '@/components/ui/card' import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button' import { Input } from '@/components/ui/input' import { Separator } from '@/components/ui/separator' import { Icon } from '@/components/ui/icon' const lines = [ { name: 'Pro plan (annual)', qty: 1, price: '$180.00' }, { name: 'Extra seats × 3', qty: 3, price: '$54.00' }, { name: 'Priority support', qty: 1, price: '$24.00' }, ] export function OrderSummary() { return ( Order summary {lines.map((l) => (
{l.name} {l.price}
))}
Total due today $258.00
) }
